/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -O3 -DNDEBUG -shared -Wl,-soname,libggml.so.0 -o ../../bin/libggml.so.0.15.2 "CMakeFiles/ggml.dir/ggml-backend-dl.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/ggml.dir/ggml-backend-reg.cpp.o"  -Wl,-rpath,/home/iptv-infra/workspace/llamacpp-aos-benchmark/build-host/bin: -ldl ../../bin/libggml-cpu.so.0.15.2 ../../bin/libggml-base.so.0.15.2
